untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern requires multi-bar geometric shape recognition (inverted cup formation, handle retracement, cup depth/height ratios, left vs right lip comparison, U-shaped volume profile over 5-20+ bars). Available indicators cannot identify the complete cup topology, handle characteristics (short handle requirement), or comparative lip heights. Pattern detection would require candlestick sequence analysis and relative price position tracking across multiple bars, which exceeds point-in-time indicator capabilities. Converted conditions approximate entry via breakout below 20-day low in uptrend with volume confirmation, but miss critical cup morphology and handle validation rules from Tables 9.1, 9.6, 9.7.
